_comment: Copy to config.json next to index.html and edit for your deployment. orchardBaseUrl is the remote Orchard tenant origin+base (include any tenant prefix, keep the trailing slash) — issuer, API, SignalR hub and media files resolve here. appBaseUrl is THIS app's own origin+base (a DIFFERENT host — that's the point of standalone); omit it to default to the page origin (handy for local dev). Register {appBaseUrl}callback.html and {appBaseUrl}silent-callback.html as RedirectUris on the 'media_gallery' OpenID client, and configure CORS on the Orchard tenant for the Media API, /connect/token and /hubs/media. Set signalrEnabled true only once SignalR CORS is in place.
